company_type: Data Center & Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT)
segments: Scale & Hyperscale Powered Base Building (> 1 MW)

dependencies: Third-party suppliers for power delivery to data centers
Third-party suppliers for equipment and materials for construction and development
Long lead time items such as generators
risks: Supply chain or procurement disruptions may lead to delays
Dependence on third-party suppliers for power
Power shortages and planned or unplanned outages
Disruptions from political events, international trade disputes and tariffs, war, terrorism, natural disasters, public health issues, industrial accidents, national security concerns, pandemics
Delays in delivery of required equipment and materials
Impact on ability to meet delivery timelines to customers

regulatory_risks: Compliance with Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA)
Environmental liabilities and regulations (CERCLA, state and local environmental laws)
Regulations on energy usage and data center development moratoria
Water usage restrictions and efficiency mandates
Permit requirements for diesel-powered generators and air quality regulations
Foreign tax laws and regulations changes
OECD Pillar Two rules (global minimum tax of 15%)
Cybersecurity regulations and SEC investigation into cybersecurity disclosures
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code
Real property and personal property tax increases
Foreign jurisdiction regulations (complex and evolving regulatory frameworks)

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions and potential curtailment of gas exports to Europe
Sanctions and penalties against Russia impacting European operations
